productDisplayName: Vans Men Classic Slip-On Black Casual Shoes
description: This is an excellent cross-over shoe from casual to formal. vans are offering you their classic slip-on shoe – comfort, practicality, durability... and adding the sophistication of slick black leather. Perfect for those times you have to look smart but don't want to sacrifice your rebellious side and cool style. Upper Leather uppers for durability and comfort Padded collar and textile lining for extra comfort Elasticated sides on the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feet Brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
